pharmacies.notes: New patients $199/mo for first 2 fills (0.25/0.5mg), then $349/mo (0.25/0.5/1mg), $499/mo (2mg). Self-pay via NovoCare Pharmacy / CoAssist Pharmacy. Source: ozempic.com 07/15/2026
Wholesale Acquisition Cost (WAC) from novopricing.com. All doses $1,027.51/mo. Updated 07/15/2026.
Self-pay coupon program. New patients $199 for first 2 fills, then $349 (0.25/0.5/1mg) or $499 (2mg). Widely accepted at retail pharmacies.
CVS offers GLP-1s as low as $149/mo with manufacturer coupon for self-pay patients. $49 MinuteClinic virtual visit. Source: cvs.com 07/15/2026.

Membership $39 first month, then $149/mo. Ozempic from $199/mo (NovoCare self-pay pricing). Cash-pay only. Source: hims.com 07/15/2026.
Ro Body membership ~$145/mo + medication cost. GLP-1s from $349/mo cash-pay. Insurance or cash-pay options. Source: ro.co 07/15/2026.

Subscription $59-$99/mo (annual $59/mo, monthly $99/mo). Ozempic $199/mo first 2 months, then $349 (0.25/0.5/1mg), $499 (2mg). Medication cost separate from subscription. Source: sesamecare.com 07/15/2026.
$49/mo membership. Ozempic $1,199/mo (billed separately). Cash-pay only, no insurance. Source: lemonaidhealth.com 07/15/2026.
$129/visit self-pay or insurance accepted ($25 with insurance). Ozempic ~$900-$1,000 self-pay. Prescriptions sent to local pharmacy. Source: plushcare.com 07/15/2026.
WW Clinic $25-$49 first month, then $74-$145/mo + medication. Ozempic list price $997.58. Insurance coordination included. Source: weightwatchers.com 07/15/2026.
$39/mo membership. Ozempic via NovoCare self-pay $199 first 2 fills, then $349 (0.25/0.5/1mg), $499 (2mg). Source: goodrx.com 07/15/2026.
$149 starting (3 weeks + 4 weeks medication), then $349/mo subscription. GLP-1 Rx Program. Brand-name drugs available but medication cost varies by insurance. Source: noom.com 07/15/2026.
Amazon Pharmacy offers NovoCare self-pay pricing. Automatic manufacturer coupons at checkout. Cash-pay option. Source: pharmacy.amazon.com 07/15/2026.
